creator: miguel.barao@gmail.com
text:
Hi
I would then suggest to change the name of this "bug" to 
"freetype2-2.10.1: "Terminus" name changed to ..." 
and add the warning of the name change in the update notices in that package/port in order to avoid people spending time trying to figure out what's going on with their desktop.
This change should be documented somewhere.
